chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-703 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.07.2024 Mr. Parkash Kumar DAG. Office objection observes as follows: 1. The subject matter in this petition pertains of SEPCO Sukkur and relief has been sought against the respondents also pertaining to District Sukkur, which do not falls within the territorial jurisdiction of this Honourable. How this petition is filed here at Circuit Court, Hyderabad instead of Sukkur Bench, Sukkur. 2. Whether the instant matter lie in the ambit of Civil Servant, if yes, how this petition is maintainable in view of Bar contained under Article 212 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. The record has been perused and there is nothing discernable to rebut the accuracy of the office objections so raised. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed. Judge Judge Ali Haider
